results.title: fixed lint regression after subscription consumer updates
results.content: Resolved project lint failure by removing unused AuthUserResponseDto import in src/auth/guards/subscription.guard.ts. Verified with yarn lint and yarn build both passing.

results.title: InboxSidebarProvider readability refactor
results.content: Improved readability without behavior changes by extracting helper utilities (mergeInboxWithRealtimeTimestamp, upsertAndSortInboxes), reducing duplicated state update logic in socket/detail/update handlers, and introducing completeCurrentDetailInboxRequest to centralize queue cleanup flow. File: src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/providers/InboxSidebarProvider.tsx

results.title: Remove deprecated useUrlQueryState hook
results.content: Deleted src/hooks/common/useUrlQueryState.ts and src/hooks/common/useUrlQueryState.test.ts after migrating inbox filter to useSearchParamsState. Verified no remaining useUrlQueryState references under src and linted related hooks.

results.title: Contact merge cache invalidation hook
results.content: Implemented Redis-backed ContactResolutionService.clearResolutionCache and wired MergeContactsUseCase to invalidate master, slave, and flattened contact resolution keys after transaction commit with warning-only failure handling. Added focused specs and verified with yarn lint, yarn build, and yarn test. Files: src/modules/contacts/application/services/contact-resolution.service.ts, src/modules/contacts/application/use-cases/merge-contacts.use-case.ts, src/modules/contacts/application/use-cases/merge-contacts.use-case.spec.ts, src/modules/contacts/application/services/contact-resolution.service.spec.ts, src/modules/contacts/contacts.module.ts, docs/design/contact-merge-progress.md

results.title: Deduplicate channel token refresh logic
results.content: Extracted duplicated LINE/ZALO token refresh logic into ChannelAccessTokenRefreshService. Service now handles provider-specific refresh operations, disconnect metadata cleanup, mark disconnected with reason, and mark connected after manual refresh. Refactored RefreshLINEAccessTokensUseCase, RefreshZALOAccessTokensUseCase, and RefreshChannelAccessTokenUseCase to reuse shared service methods. Registered service in channels.module providers.
